Your own videos from Mozambique

by Air Tricks Prod

Kitesurfing, the sport conducive to video editing

On camera and editing:

With more than 10 years of experience, Air Tricks Prod specializes in shooting, editing and editing videos dedicated to water sports.
With a Sony semi-pro camera, high frame rate go-pros for slow motion, a DJI drone for remote shots, we offer you to bring back an unforgettable memory of your stay with us.
